summary: Iteration 2 testing of SBC Manager: FreeSWITCH ESL + CDR webhook integration in disabled/simulator mode. Backend: 32/32 pytest cases passed (added 10 new tests for /freeswitch/status, /freeswitch/reload, /cdr/webhook (localhost + external block + invalid json + disposition mapping ANSWERED/NO ANSWER/BUSY), DELETE /live-channels source=simulator). Frontend: fs-status-card on Dashboard shows 'Modo simulador (ESL desativado)' + Fonte=Simulator; FreeSWITCH page fs-status-strip shows SIMULADOR and fs-reload-btn hidden; LiveChannels page live-source-tag = SIMULATOR. All 10 sidebar sections load with zero console/error nodes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CDR webhook: `start_epoch` handling uses short-circuit `v.get('start_stamp') or v.get('start_epoch') and str(...)` - correct behavior but readability suffers. Consider splitting to two branches.
server.py is now 1118 lines - close to 700-line threshold suggested. Consider splitting into routers/freeswitch.py, routers/cdr.py, routers/auth.py.

webhook localhost guard checks request.client.host but relies on nginx to restrict externally. In-cluster (k8s ingress) the proxy IP was correctly non-127.0.0.1 - verified 403 on public URL. If deployed behind additional proxies with X-Forwarded-For rewrite, this check remains safe (uses socket peer, not header).

fs_state is a module-level mutable dict shared across requests without lock - acceptable for single-worker uvicorn but flag for future gunicorn multi-worker deployment (use Redis or per-worker state).
esl_client is None-checked in reload but /freeswitch/status returns the raw fs_state without hiding esl-related fields (uptime/version = None). Frontend handles null OK.
seed_data_creation: None new. Test creates CDRs via webhook with call_ids prefixed wh-test-* (persist in db.cdr).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Webhook /api/cdr/webhook is localhost-only guarded by request.client.host in ('127.0.0.1','::1','localhost'). To test successful POST, use http://localhost:8001 directly (bypasses ingress). Public URL correctly returns 403. In preview FS_ESL_ENABLED=false so /api/freeswitch/status returns esl_enabled=false, source=simulator, esl_connected=false, channels_count=0. /api/freeswitch/reload returns 400 with detail 'ESL não habilitado'. Simulator loop populates live_channels every 3-6s. Note: CDR list endpoint has default limit=200 and sorts by started_at desc - test CDRs with old start_epoch (e.g. 1750000000 = 2025) fall past default limit; use ?limit=2000 to fetch them for verification.
